commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed after current head addressed the age-gating blocker; maintainer action is normal CI and merge review.; Cleared: The diff does not change dependencies, lockfiles, scripts, permissions, credentials, or external code execution; the remaining concern is functional session cleanup safety. commands.review_summary:
The branch changes read-only doctor session-store scans to avoid cache/cloning, adds session-store temp identification and stale cleanup, and forwards a tempPrefix through atomic text writes with focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source shows current default loadSessionStore caches and clones large stores, and the PR body provides a heap-capped terminal harness where the default load OOMs while the read-only load succeeds; I did not rerun it in this read-only checkout.
